GSE164378 UMI Scaling Diagnostics

This page isolates the UMI-depth behavior for the GSE164378 3’ CITE-seq example. It refits the RNA spike model at each UMI sampling rate, shows the MP bulk fit, tracks the detected spike count, and compares theoretical and empirical RNA-ADT MI.

library(scScale)
## Loading required package: Matrix
data(gse164378_3p_citeseq_hvg)

rna_counts <- gse164378_3p_citeseq_hvg$rna_counts
adt_counts <- gse164378_3p_citeseq_hvg$adt_counts

count_transform <- "log1p_cpm"
sampling_rates <- c(0.10, 0.20, 0.35, 0.50, 0.70, 0.85, 1.00)
r_theory_cap <- 12
r_empirical <- 12

mp_density <- getFromNamespace("scscale_mp_density", "scScale")

dim(rna_counts)
## [1] 2000 4000
dim(adt_counts)
## [1]  228 4000

Target Side

adt_fit <- scscale_fit(
  adt_counts,
  count_transform = count_transform,
  fit_umi = FALSE,
  mp_max_iter = 300,
  mp_grid_n = 3000,
  store_matrix = TRUE
)

r_Y <- sum(adt_fit$spikes$is_spike)
theta_Y <- adt_fit$theta_X[seq_len(r_Y)]
z_Y <- right_singular_vectors(adt_fit$matrix, r = r_Y)

data.frame(
  modality = "ADT",
  p = adt_fit$p,
  n = adt_fit$n,
  c_X = adt_fit$c_X,
  n_spikes = r_Y,
  tau2 = adt_fit$bulk$tau2,
  lambda_plus = adt_fit$bulk$lambda_plus,
  selected_iteration = adt_fit$bulk$selected_iteration
)
##   modality   p    n   c_X n_spikes      tau2 lambda_plus selected_iteration
## 1      ADT 228 4000 0.057       13 0.3757363    0.576565                 13

Refit RNA At Each UMI Depth

fit_rows <- vector("list", length(sampling_rates))
fit_list <- vector("list", length(sampling_rates))
names(fit_list) <- as.character(sampling_rates)

for (i in seq_along(sampling_rates)) {
  rho <- sampling_rates[i]
  rna_sub <- rna_counts
  if (rho < 1) {
    rna_sub <- scscale_downsample_counts_fraction(rna_sub, fraction = rho, seed = 564378 + i)
  }

  fit_rho <- scscale_fit(
    rna_sub,
    count_transform = count_transform,
    fit_umi = FALSE,
    mp_max_iter = 300,
    mp_grid_n = 3000,
    store_matrix = TRUE
  )
  fit_list[[as.character(rho)]] <- fit_rho

  n_spikes <- sum(fit_rho$spikes$is_spike)
  r_X <- min(r_theory_cap, n_spikes)
  z_X <- right_singular_vectors(fit_rho$matrix, r = r_X)
  P_XY <- scscale_subspace_overlap_matrix(z_X, z_Y)
  mi_theory <- scscale_low_rank_mi(
    fit_rho$theta_X[seq_len(r_X)],
    theta_Y,
    P = P_XY
  )
  mi_empirical <- scscale_empirical_mi(
    rna_sub,
    adt_counts,
    r = r_empirical,
    count_transform = count_transform
  )

  fit_rows[[i]] <- data.frame(
    sampling_rate = rho,
    total_umi_observed = sum(rna_sub),
    p = fit_rho$p,
    n = fit_rho$n,
    c_X = fit_rho$c_X,
    n_spikes = n_spikes,
    r_X_used = r_X,
    tau2 = fit_rho$bulk$tau2,
    lambda_plus = fit_rho$bulk$lambda_plus,
    selected_iteration = fit_rho$bulk$selected_iteration,
    I_theory = mi_theory$I_theory,
    I_empirical = mi_empirical$mi,
    r_empirical = r_empirical,
    r_eff_empirical = mi_empirical$r_eff
  )
}

umi_diagnostics <- do.call(rbind, fit_rows)
umi_diagnostics
##   sampling_rate total_umi_observed    p    n c_X n_spikes r_X_used      tau2
## 1          0.10            2658332 2000 4000 0.5      112       12 0.5366700
## 2          0.20            5325655 2000 4000 0.5       73       12 0.5574595
## 3          0.35            9311275 2000 4000 0.5       53       12 0.5014623
## 4          0.50           13303440 2000 4000 0.5       47       12 0.4418649
## 5          0.70           18624770 2000 4000 0.5      170       12 0.3422729
## 6          0.85           22614031 2000 4000 0.5       77       12 0.3294406
## 7          1.00           26603426 2000 4000 0.5       56       12 0.3031486
##   lambda_plus selected_iteration I_theory I_empirical r_empirical
## 1   1.5639709                112 3.350456    4.141675          12
## 2   1.6245562                 73 3.866291    4.885489          12
## 3   1.4613682                 53 4.191357    5.294664          12
## 4   1.2876887                 47 4.331403    5.446034          12
## 5   0.9974563                170 4.499837    5.595707          12
## 6   0.9600603                 77 4.543757    5.647953          12
## 7   0.8834398                 56 4.602900    5.711470          12
##   r_eff_empirical
## 1              12
## 2              12
## 3              12
## 4              12
## 5              12
## 6              12
## 7              12

MP Bulk Fits

old_par <- par(mfrow = c(3, 3), mar = c(4.0, 4.0, 2.6, 1))
for (rho in sampling_rates) {
  fit_rho <- fit_list[[as.character(rho)]]
  lambda <- fit_rho$spectrum$lambda
  bulk <- fit_rho$bulk
  bulk_lambda <- lambda[bulk$bulk_index]
  bulk_lambda <- bulk_lambda[is.finite(bulk_lambda) & bulk_lambda > 0]
  mp_x <- seq(max(bulk$mp_lower, 0), bulk$lambda_plus, length.out = 500)
  mp_y <- mp_density(mp_x, c_X = fit_rho$c_X, tau2 = bulk$tau2)

  hist(
    bulk_lambda,
    breaks = 60,
    freq = FALSE,
    col = "grey85",
    border = "white",
    xlab = expression(lambda),
    main = paste0("rho=", rho, ", spikes=", sum(fit_rho$spikes$is_spike))
  )
  lines(mp_x, mp_y, col = "#D55E00", lwd = 2)
  abline(v = bulk$lambda_plus, col = "#D55E00", lty = 2)
}
plot.new()
plot.new()

par(old_par)

Spike Count

plot(
  umi_diagnostics$sampling_rate,
  umi_diagnostics$r_X_used,
  type = "b",
  pch = 16,
  col = "#0072B2",
  ylim = range(c(umi_diagnostics$n_spikes, umi_diagnostics$r_X_used)),
  xlab = expression("Sampling rate " * rho),
  ylab = "RNA spikes",
  main = "Detected vs used RNA spikes"
)
lines(umi_diagnostics$sampling_rate, umi_diagnostics$n_spikes, type = "b", pch = 1, col = "grey35")
legend(
  "topright",
  legend = c("used for theory", "detected"),
  col = c("#0072B2", "grey35"),
  pch = c(16, 1),
  lwd = 1,
  bty = "n"
)

UMI MI Scaling

old_par <- par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4.2, 4.3, 2.6, 1))

plot(
  umi_diagnostics$sampling_rate,
  umi_diagnostics$I_theory,
  type = "b",
  pch = 16,
  col = "#0072B2",
  xlab = expression("Sampling rate " * rho),
  ylab = expression(I[theory]),
  main = "Theoretical MI"
)

plot(
  umi_diagnostics$sampling_rate,
  umi_diagnostics$I_empirical,
  type = "b",
  pch = 17,
  col = "#D55E00",
  xlab = expression("Sampling rate " * rho),
  ylab = expression(I[empirical]),
  main = paste0("Empirical MI, r=", r_empirical)
)

par(old_par)
